heroLede: Product owner / forward-deployed engineer by day, CS student by night. I like problems with feedback loops: agents, controllers, catalogs, and the occasional rabbit hole.
paragraphs: By day I’m a product owner and forward-deployed engineer at Deloitte — ConvergeHealth’s software development arm — building an agentic platform for healthcare revenue cycle. By night, this site: coursework that got out of hand, and personal tools made with Claude Code that solved a real problem in my apartment (usually the CD shelf).
I care about work that can be inspected: plots over adjectives, demos over decks. School projects respect the honor code — source available upon request, happily walked through.
asideNote: Recruiters: the CV is one tab over.
